/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-s -Wl,--gc-sections  -o _meshmonk_core.cpython-311-aarch64-linux-gnu.so CMakeFiles/_meshmonk_core.dir/bindings/bindings.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/workspace/build2/Build/lib: libnanobind-static.a library/libmeshmonk_lib.a Build/lib/libOpenMeshTools.so.11.0 Build/lib/libOpenMeshCore.so.11.0
